description: Diagnostic-only timing canary manifest for private React DOM root host-output rows; public comparable timing remains blocked until public compatibility gates are green.

acceptedGate.notes: Workers 352 and 380 prove 16 private host-output diagnostic scenario-mode rows for createRoot side effects, initial render, update, replacement, render-null clearing, unmount, double-unmount, and render-after-unmount guards while public root E2E compatibility remains blocked.
The public root render E2E gate still admits 0 public scenario-mode rows, so private host-output timing canaries cannot become public comparable timing evidence.

The public facade gate keeps createRoot, hydrateRoot, render, unmount, listener setup, browser DOM mutation, portals, and compatibility claims blocked despite private fake-DOM host-output diagnostics.

milestones.description: Private root host-output timing canaries may collect diagnostic timing for the admitted fake-DOM rows only.
milestones.blockedReason: Private host-output timing canaries are admitted only for diagnostic fake-DOM timing; public React DOM root compatibility and comparable timing remain blocked.

milestones.description: Public comparable timing promotion remains blocked until public root render and public facade gates become green.
milestones.blockedReason: Comparable public timing remains blocked until public root render E2E and public facade gates are green-admitted and claim compatibility; private timing canaries do not satisfy public root behavior.

scenarios.area: react-dom private root host-output timing canary
scenarios.blockedReason: The createRoot marker/listener timing canary is private fake-DOM evidence only; public root creation, listener setup, compatibility, and comparable timing remain blocked.

scenarios.area: react-dom private root host-output timing canary
scenarios.blockedReason: The initial render timing canary covers only private fake-DOM HostComponent/HostText output; public createRoot render, browser DOM mutation, compatibility, and comparable timing remain blocked.

scenarios.area: react-dom private root host-output timing canary
scenarios.blockedReason: The update render timing canary covers only private fake-DOM property/text mutation and latest-props publication; public update rendering, compatibility, and comparable timing remain blocked.

scenarios.area: react-dom private root host-output timing canary
scenarios.blockedReason: The replacement timing canary covers only private fake-DOM remove/place output and latest-props detach/attach diagnostics; public replacement rendering, compatibility, and comparable timing remain blocked.

scenarios.area: react-dom private root host-output timing canary
scenarios.blockedReason: The render(null) clear timing canary covers only private fake-DOM clearContainer and detach diagnostics; public container clearing, compatibility, and comparable timing remain blocked.

scenarios.area: react-dom private root host-output timing canary
scenarios.blockedReason: The unmount cleanup timing canary covers only private fake-DOM cleanup, latest-props detach, and marker/listener revert diagnostics; public root unmount, compatibility, and comparable timing remain blocked.

scenarios.area: react-dom private root host-output timing canary
scenarios.blockedReason: The double-unmount timing canary covers only private fake-DOM first-unmount cleanup and second-unmount no-op mutation diagnostics; public repeated unmount behavior, compatibility, and comparable timing remain blocked.

scenarios.area: react-dom private root host-output timing canary
scenarios.blockedReason: The render-after-unmount guard timing canary covers only private stale-root throw and no-extra-mutation diagnostics; public error surface compatibility and comparable timing remain blocked.
